marketSnapshot.note: S&P 500 broke the 7,000 mark this week after a volatile Q1 — best weekly gain since May 2025.

stocks.name: NVIDIA Corp.
stocks.thesis: Dominant AI-accelerator franchise. Revenue grew +73% YoY with management guiding +77% next quarter. Datacenter TAM seen reaching $3–4T annual spend by 2030.
stocks.catalysts: Blackwell Ultra ramp · Rubin architecture disclosures · hyperscaler capex guides.

stocks.name: Microsoft Corp.
stocks.thesis: Azure growing +39% YoY with $625B commercial RPO. Copilot monetisation ramping. Margin expansion room not yet in consensus per Morgan Stanley / Goldman.
stocks.catalysts: Q3 FY26 earnings (Apr 29) · Azure growth print · Copilot seat disclosures.

stocks.name: Broadcom Inc.
stocks.thesis: Custom silicon (XPU) + networking franchise serving hyperscalers. VMware cross-sell driving software mix. Structural winner in AI-interconnect.
stocks.catalysts: Hyperscaler ASIC wins · VMware ARR · Tomahawk 6 networking ramp.

stocks.name: Amazon.com Inc.
stocks.thesis: AWS reaccelerating — +24% Q4'25 with $57B backlog add. $200B FY26 capex for AI infra. Retail margins improving; ads compounding.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 1) · AWS growth cadence · AI services revenue.

stocks.name: Alphabet Inc.
stocks.thesis: Google Cloud growing mid-30s%. Gemini 2.0 + AI Overviews defending search. YouTube ads + subscription compounding. Waymo quietly scaling. Cheap vs Mag-7 peers.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 24) · Cloud growth · antitrust remedy ruling · Gemini 3.

stocks.name: Meta Platforms
stocks.thesis: Ad revenue reaccelerating from AI ranking gains. Llama 4 open-weight strategy expanding reach. Reality Labs losses stabilising. Ray-Ban smart glasses inflecting.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 30) · ad pricing · Llama 4 multimodal · Meta AI MAU.

stocks.name: Apple Inc.
stocks.thesis: Services now ~28% of revenue at 70%+ margins. iPhone 17 Pro refresh cycle +Apple Intelligence rollout supports units. Capital return program continues.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 FY26 earnings (May 1) · services growth · China iPhone sell-through.

stocks.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
stocks.thesis: Raised FY26 USD revenue growth guide to >30%. Q1 revenue +40.6% YoY. Sole-source for NVDA, AMD, AAPL leading-edge nodes. Capex at $52–56B.
stocks.catalysts: Monthly sales · 2nm node ramp · Arizona fab milestones · CoWoS capacity.

stocks.name: Advanced Micro Devices
stocks.thesis: MI350 ramp with hyperscaler wins. France AI sovereign deal + server CPU share take. Valuation full but earnings trajectory improving.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 6) · MI400 disclosures · server CPU share.

stocks.name: Micron Technology
stocks.thesis: HBM3E/HBM4 sold out through 2026. DRAM pricing still tight; NAND stabilising. Cyclical with secular AI-memory tailwind.
stocks.catalysts: HBM4 qualification · DRAM contract pricing · NAND recovery pace.

stocks.name: Arm Holdings
stocks.thesis: Royalty model scales with AI compute. v9 + Neoverse mix-shift lifts per-chip royalty. Custom silicon proliferation a tailwind.
stocks.catalysts: Q4 FY26 earnings (May 7) · v9 adoption · hyperscaler ARM share.

stocks.name: Salesforce
stocks.thesis: Agentforce (AI agents) driving upsell. FCF compounding >20%. Margin expansion story with ongoing cost discipline.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 28) · Agentforce ARR · Data Cloud attach.

stocks.name: Oracle
stocks.thesis: OCI growing triple-digits. AI training workloads + Stargate exposure. RPO up sharply; multi-year revenue visibility.
stocks.catalysts: Q4 FY26 earnings (Jun 10) · OCI growth · capex cadence.

stocks.name: Snowflake
stocks.thesis: Product revenue growing high-20s. Cortex AI workloads inflecting. NRR stabilising around 125%. FCF margin expanding.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 21) · Cortex AI ARR · consumption guide.

stocks.name: CrowdStrike
stocks.thesis: Falcon platform consolidation continues. Charlotte AI driving SOC automation. Net retention >120%. July 2024 outage fully in the rearview.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Jun 4) · module attach · Next-Gen SIEM ARR.

stocks.name: Palo Alto Networks
stocks.thesis: Platformization strategy driving ARR consolidation. Leading position in AI-native SOC (XSIAM). Morgan Stanley top cybersecurity pick.
stocks.catalysts: Q3 earnings (May 20) · NGS ARR growth · XSIAM deal size.

stocks.name: Cloudflare
stocks.thesis: Workers AI + edge inference scaling. Enterprise large-deal traction accelerating. Mizuho top software pick with >$500K deal growth.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 7) · Workers AI revenue · large deal count.

stocks.name: Zscaler
stocks.thesis: Zero-Trust Exchange scaling with SASE adoption. ARR past $2.8B. FCF margin expanding toward 25%+.
stocks.catalysts: Q3 FY26 earnings (May 28) · ARR growth · FedRAMP High wins.

stocks.name: ServiceNow Inc.
stocks.thesis: Workflow leader with AI-agent layer (Now Assist). Sector valuation ~40% below 3-yr avg per Mizuho — compelling risk/reward.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 23) · Now Assist ARR · federal pipeline.

stocks.name: Datadog
stocks.thesis: AI-native customers now ~12% of ARR. Platform expansion into security + LLM observability. NRR rebounding.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 6) · AI customer cohort · LLM observability ARR.

stocks.name: JPMorgan Chase
stocks.thesis: Q1 EPS $5.94 beat $5.46 on IB + trading strength. Fortress balance sheet, 2.2% yield, benefits from healthy credit cycle.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 earnings (Jul 15) · NII trajectory · Basel III endgame · buybacks.

stocks.name: Bank of America
stocks.thesis: Q1 EPS $1.11 beat $1.00. Trading revenue up 12% (16th straight quarter of trading gains). NII ramping.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 earnings (Jul 16) · NII growth · deposit mix · consumer credit.

stocks.name: Visa Inc.
stocks.thesis: Cross-border volume recovering; value-added services compounding. Exceptional FCF conversion; consistent buybacks.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 FY26 earnings (Apr 28) · cross-border volumes · VAS mix.

stocks.name: Mastercard
stocks.thesis: B2B + cyber/intel services driving growth premium vs V. Incremental margins remain high.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 30) · cross-border · services revenue.

stocks.name: BlackRock
stocks.thesis: Q1 EPS $12.53 beat $11.48. Record AUM; private markets integration post GIP/HPS. ETF flows dominant.
stocks.catalysts: Private markets fee ramp · ETF flows · Aladdin attach.

stocks.name: Goldman Sachs
stocks.thesis: M&A + ECM reopening. Wealth management franchise growing. Return-on-equity trajectory back above 13%.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 earnings (Jul 15) · IB backlog · ROE trajectory.

stocks.name: Valero Energy
stocks.thesis: Goldman's top refiner pick. Tight product markets, 2.0% dividend, fwd P/E of 11x. Highly cash-generative.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 24) · summer crack spreads · refinery utilisation.

stocks.name: ExxonMobil
stocks.thesis: Pioneer synergies ramping. Guyana production growth + LNG expansion. ~3.3% dividend yield.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 2) · Guyana production · Pioneer cost synergies.

stocks.name: Chevron
stocks.thesis: Hess close rekindling Guyana upside. TCO ramp underway. ~4.1% yield, consistent buybacks.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 2) · Hess integration · TCO ramp.

stocks.name: Marathon Petroleum
stocks.thesis: Goldman top refiner pick. Highest cap-return yield in group. Midstream MPLX stake accretive.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 6) · summer cracks · buyback cadence.

stocks.name: Constellation Energy
stocks.thesis: Nuclear fleet positioned for hyperscaler PPAs. 36% upside to consensus target. Guidance reset in April created entry point.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 7) · new PPA announcements · nuclear tax credits.

stocks.name: Eli Lilly & Co.
stocks.thesis: Mounjaro/Zepbound GLP-1 still supply-constrained. FDA approved oral GLP-1 (Foundayo). Orforglipron catalyst approaches.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 30) · Foundayo launch · orforglipron Ph3 CV data.

stocks.name: UnitedHealth Group
stocks.thesis: MLR stabilising; Optum Health + Rx compounding. Post-MA headline overhang fading. Reasonable entry vs history.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 17) · MLR trajectory · MA bids.

stocks.name: Novo Nordisk
stocks.thesis: Wegovy/Ozempic supply improving; pipeline includes amycretin, CagriSema. Trades at discount to LLY on GLP-1 franchise.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 7) · CagriSema Ph3 · amycretin data.

stocks.name: Intuitive Surgical
stocks.thesis: da Vinci 5 ramp; procedure growth double-digits. Pristine recurring revenue mix. Expanded indications opening new TAM.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 22) · dv5 placements · procedure growth.

stocks.name: AbbVie
stocks.thesis: Skyrizi + Rinvoq offsetting Humira erosion faster than expected. 2026 seen as trough year with growth reaccelerating into 2027.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 25) · Skyrizi/Rinvoq scripts · post-Humira trajectory.

stocks.name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
stocks.thesis: Biopharma capex bottoming. Pharma services backlog rebuilding. PPI pricing engine intact.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 23) · biopharma order trends · pharma services growth.

stocks.name: Costco Wholesale
stocks.thesis: Membership income +13.6% YoY, traffic +3.0%, ticket +4.8%. Defensive compounder with exceptional pricing power.
stocks.catalysts: April sales report · membership fee comps · special dividend.

stocks.name: Walmart
stocks.thesis: Advertising + Marketplace + Walmart+ driving mix-shift to higher margins. Automation capex scaling.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 15) · ad revenue · e-commerce profitability.

stocks.name: Procter & Gamble
stocks.thesis: Pricing holding; volumes inflecting positive. China stabilising. FX becoming a tailwind. Dividend aristocrat at 2.4% yield.
stocks.catalysts: Q3 FY26 earnings (Apr 23) · volume growth · China trajectory.

stocks.name: Home Depot
stocks.thesis: Pro customer growth accelerating post-SRS Distribution. Housing turnover stabilising. Long-tenured management.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 20) · comps · pro segment growth.

stocks.name: Nike
stocks.thesis: Turnaround under new CEO (Elliott Hill). Product pipeline resetting; wholesale re-engagement. Risk/reward improving but still early innings.
stocks.catalysts: Q4 FY26 earnings (Jun 25) · DTC/wholesale mix · China recovery.

stocks.name: McDonald's
stocks.thesis: Value menu reviving traffic. Delivery + loyalty program scaling. International comps improving.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 29) · US comps · value platform traction.

stocks.name: Starbucks
stocks.thesis: Back-to-Starbucks turnaround under Niccol showing early signs. Menu simplification + service speed investments.
stocks.catalysts: Q2 FY26 earnings (Apr 29) · US traffic · China strategy update.

stocks.name: Caterpillar
stocks.thesis: Data center power gensets + mining + construction cycles converging. Backlog at record levels.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 30) · backlog · data center orders.

stocks.name: GE Aerospace
stocks.thesis: Aftermarket services on installed engine base compound. LEAP maturation; air traffic growth supportive.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 22) · services growth · LEAP deliveries.

stocks.name: Honeywell
stocks.thesis: Portfolio split into three standalone companies unlocking sum-of-parts value. Aerospace + automation remain strong.
stocks.catalysts: Portfolio separation progress · Q1 earnings (Apr 24) · aerospace growth.

stocks.name: Vistra Corp.
stocks.thesis: Nuclear + gas fleet best-positioned for Texas AI data center demand. New Chief AI & Digital Officer signals growth focus.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 7) · data center PPAs · Comanche Peak outlook.

stocks.name: NextEra Energy
stocks.thesis: Largest renewable developer + FPL regulated utility. AI power demand creating long-dated renewable PPAs.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (Apr 23) · renewables backlog · FPL rate case.

stocks.name: Linde plc
stocks.thesis: Industrial gas duopoly with project backlog at record levels. Clean hydrogen + semiconductor exposure compounding.
stocks.catalysts: Q1 earnings (May 1) · project backlog · hydrogen wins.
